column1: # Sample per-user TLV profiles for interceptor_hash_tlv.py
# Edit this file on the host (if bind-mounted) OR inside the container and the
# interceptor picks up changes on the next submit — no restart needed. The
# script caches parsed rows keyed on the file's mtime (see
#   * TAG   — hex (0x1400) or decimal (5120). Vendor range: 0x1400 – 0x3FFF.

column2: as a string. Colons inside the value are OK.

column1: #               Int1 Int2 Int4 Int8 OctetString COctetString
#             parse correctly (the parser recognises the type token wherever
#             it appears after the tag). If omitted
#             from the smppccm custom_tlvs config at dispatch time
# Lines beginning with `#` and blank lines are ignored.
# --- Example 1: a user with three declared TLVs (all authoritative) ---
# --- Example 2: a user with a single required TLV
#     (resolved from the smppcc config — e.g. OctetString if nothing else set) ---
#     0x1400 sent as a raw 8-byte big-endian integer (Int8)
